title: mentha × dumetorum var. nemorivaga
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. nemorivaga, also known as woodland mint, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the mint plant species. It is characterized by its unique appearance and aroma, and is often used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The medicinal properties of woodland mint include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations. Woodland mint can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
